response_parsed.reasoning: The call primarily revolves around a billing dispute concerning unexpected overage charges related to the Comply and Detect modules. The customer, Clearwater Medical, is contesting these charges due to a lack of notification about exceeding report generation limits and potential billing errors linked to a previous outage. The support team is committed to investigating these issues and providing a resolution.
evidence_quotes: we got our April invoice and there are overage charges totaling just over four thousand dollars that I do not understand
I had absolutely no warning that I was going to blow past some threshold and rack up thousands of dollars in charges
we might be getting charged for the retry traffic that your system generated because of your own outage.
